title: ecbolium racemosum
intro: Ecbolium racemosum, a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, is native to tropical Africa. The plant is also known as the "African coleus" or "Coleus racemosus", and its leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties. The leaves of Ecbolium racemosum are valued for their anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which make them useful in treating various health conditions, including fever, cough, and skin infections. Herbal preparations of Ecbolium racemosum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to promote overall health and wellness.
